Tier 1 Stock
Tier 2 Watchlist
Macro
Sector
Commodity
Node border: verdict (BUY=green / HOLD=amber / PASS=gray / WEAK=red)
Node size: edge degree (more connections = bigger)
Thick red/amber border: active or elevated triggers
Edge thickness: weight (activation recency × directness)
Edge fade: ≤90d fresh / 91-180d mild / 181-365d dashed stale / 366+d dormant
Orange edges: activated today
Tip: orphan nodes hidden by default — toggle in filter drawer (top-right).
